enroll.title: Ready to meet your friends?
enroll.subtitle: We need your mum or dad to say yes first! Just pop in their email and we'll ask them. 😊
enroll.approvalNotFound: Hmm, we can't find it! Try sending a new one above 👆
enroll.privacyNote: 🔒 We only use this to ask for permission. Nothing else!
enroll.familyLanguage: Language set by your family account

waiting.title: Message sent! 🎉
waiting.subtitle: We sent your parent an email. As soon as they say yes, Migo will come to life!
waiting.waitingFor: Waiting for your parent to tap "Yes"…

celebration.title: Your parent said YES!! 🥳
celebration.subtitle: Time to set up your Migo! Go find your parent — you'll need them for the first few steps!
celebration.parentNote: Your child's account is approved. The next few steps need you — grab the device and let's get started together!

onboarding.parentsNote: Parents — this part is for you

basics.title: Tell us about your child
basics.subtitle: Parents — fill this in with your child sitting with you.
basics.specialNeedsLabel: My child has special needs or learning differences
basics.specialNeedsDesc: Dyslexia, ADHD, autism spectrum, pre-reader, motor needs, and more
basics.preReaderDesc: Enables Read to me mode automatically — the app will speak everything aloud

needs.title: Any special needs?
needs.subtitle: This helps us set Migo up perfectly! Pick all that apply — you can change this any time.

photo.title: Create {{name}}'s look
photo.subtitle: Your child can watch and help pick their theme!
photo.uploadDesc: Turned into a cartoon — real photo deleted immediately
photo.buildDesc: Choose hair, eyes, skin tone and accessories
photo.buildAvatarDescription: Design {{name}}'s unique avatar — face shape, hair, eyes, accessories and more!
photo.skipDesc: Use a default avatar — set it up later
photo.privacyNote: 🔒 The real photo is used only to generate the cartoon and is permanently deleted right after.
photo.tapToChoosePhoto: Tap to choose a photo from your camera roll

mascot.mascotChooseHint: In a moment you'll meet Miga, Pixel, Finn and Sage — they're all amazing, so take your time choosing!
mascot.title: Pick your guide!
mascot.tapToHear: 🔊 Tap to hear what to do!

interests.title: Just for {{name}}!
interests.mascotSpeech: Now the fun part!! Tap everything you love — this helps me find your perfect friends! Pick as many as you want! 🎉
interests.freeTextPlaceholder: Type something you love… or tap the mic to say it!

role.title: Your Forever Guide

mascotHappyPicked.boy: I'm so happy you picked me! Ask a parent to read about my role in Migo with you! 🎉
mascotHappyPicked.girl: I'm so happy you picked me! Ask a parent to read about my role in Migo with you! 🎉

role.role1Desc: Every badge, level-up, and milestone — I'll be the first to cheer for you
role.role2Desc: If the app does something weird, just tell me and I'll sort it out
role.role3Desc: If you haven't been around for a while, I'll send a friendly hello
role.role4Desc: If anything ever feels wrong, come to me first — I've got you
role.role5Desc: New friends, seasonal themes, app updates — you'll hear it from me first
role.permanentNote: Unlike your other friends, {{mascot}} is always there — you can never remove me, and I'll never go away. I'm yours forever!

personality.title: Just for {{name}}!
personality.migaBubble: Now I want to get to know the REAL you! These help me find friends who truly get you 🌟
personality.migaBubble_girl: Now I want to get to know the REAL you! These help me find friends who truly get you 🌟
personality.q1: In a group of friends, you are usually...
personality.q1_quiet_desc: I listen more than I talk
personality.q2: When something goes wrong you usually...
personality.q3: Your friends would say you are...
personality.q5: When you meet someone new you feel...
personality.q5_nervous_desc: I need time to warm up
personality.freeTextLabel: Anything else {{mascot}} should know about you? 🌟
personality.freeTextSub: Your favourite show, something special about you, anything!
personality.freeTextPlaceholder: Tell {{mascot}} something special about you... (totally optional!)

pack.title: Just for {{name}}!
pack.packTitle: Amazing choices!! Now — what should your friends look like? Pick the style you love most!

packs.sketchCrewDesc: Illustrated portraits, like a comic book
packs.animalGangDesc: Every friend is a fun animal character

friends.title: A surprise! 🎁
friends.subtitle: I found 3 friends who match you perfectly, {{name}}!
friends.cantWait: I can't wait to meet them! →
friends.tryDifferent: Not feeling it? Try different friends →
friends.confirmRegen: Are you sure? You'll meet 2 new friends but say goodbye to these.
friends.regenMaxed: You've met all the best matches for you! 🌟

allset.title: You're all set, {{name}}! 🎊
allset.subtitle: {{mascot}} and {{friend}} are already waiting for you!
allset.parentNoteDesc: You can see everything {{name}} does, manage friends, set screen time limits, and get instant safety alerts — anytime. Just open Migo and tap "I'm a parent" to log in.

feed.emptyTitle: Your friends are preparing their first posts... 🌟

dm.usuallyReplies: 🕐 Usually replies in a few minutes
dm.sayHello:
Say hello to {{name}}!
They'd love to hear from you.
dm.micPermissionDenied: We need permission to use your mic 🎤
dm.voiceError: Hmm, I couldn't catch that — try again! 🎤

luna.photoAdded: 📸 Photo added — Luna can see it
luna.photoPrivacyText: Your photo goes straight to Ms. Luna to help you. It's never saved anywhere and disappears as soon as she's read it!
luna.photoHelpPrompt: Can you help me with this?
luna.lunabusy: I'm a little busy right now — give me a moment and try again! 🌟

jules.photoPrivacyText: Jules will look at your photo to help with your mission. Photos are never saved — Jules sees it once and it's gone.

discover.lunaDesc: She helps with maths, reading, science and more — in your own time, your own way.
discover.julesDesc: Jules runs a digital cahier de vacances — fun daily missions in maths, reading, history and science, tailored to your child's level. Keep skills sharp all summer.
discover.sophieDesc: Sophie's like a big sister who keeps it real about staying safe online — no boring lectures, just honest chats.

games.tttWin: You win! 🎉 Three in a row!
games.storyYourTurn: Your turn — add to the story!

friendProfile.removeFriendBody: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} as a friend? Your conversation history will be kept in case you add them again.

friends.noFriendsYet: Complete onboarding to meet your first friends!

milestones.digitalCitizenship: Complete all three levels of the social media safety course with Sophie

profile.title: My Profile

friends.empty: Complete onboarding to meet your first friends!

memories.empty: Your memories will show up here as you use Migo! 🌟

settings.title: Settings ⚙️
settings.signOutConfirm: You'll be able to pick your profile again, or add a new one.

profile.avatarTapMessage: Ask a parent to change your photo 👨‍👩‍👧

parentLogin.title: Parent Login
parentLogin.subtitle: Sign in to manage your child's Migo account.
parentLogin.errorEmptyFields: Please enter your email and password.
parentLogin.errorInvalid: Incorrect email or password. Please try again.
parentLogin.resetLinkSent: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way.
parentLogin.otpSubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. It expires in 10 minutes.
parentLogin.otpResent: A new code is on its way.
parentLogin.otpErrorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

parentAddChild.title: Add a Child
parentAddChild.subtitle: Enter your child's name and age to get started. They'll complete the rest of the setup themselves.

parentChildren.title: Your Children
parentChildren.subtitle: Select a child to view their dashboard.

kidPicker.title: Who's playing?
kidPicker.subtitle: Tap your name to jump in!

timeLimit.title: See you tomorrow!
timeLimit.message: You've had a great day on Migo! Your friends will be waiting for you when you come back 🌟
timeLimit.askParent: Ask a parent for more time
timeLimit.parentHint: Ask your parent to open Migo and tap 'Give more time' on your dashboard.

parent.noChildProfileDesc: Complete the child setup in the app first.

mood.title: Mood History
mood.crisisTitle: Crisis flag in the last 7 days
mood.crisisDesc: Our AI detected signs of distress. Check the Alerts tab.

friends.title: AI Friends
friends.infoText: All of your child's friends are safe AI characters created just for them. No real strangers, ever.

alerts.title: Safety Alerts
alerts.emptyDesc: No alerts — your child is doing great.
